title: Eva Character Designs
wikitext:
[]: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by ShonHam » Sun Feb 17, 2019 2:57 am Quite evidently Eva has got character designs that appeal to a very large audience, so out of sheer curiosity I'm interested to get feedback on these few questions (answer as few or many as you'd like) - 1) Which Eva character design is your favourite and why? 2) Of all the Eva character designs, which would you say is the most well-crafted and why? 3) Did Eva's style/designs grow on you over time, or was it something that made you enticed to watch the show from the very beginning?

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Sun Feb 17, 2019 11:45 am 1. Shinji because he's the one that I instantly recognize. 2. Misato because her well curved and mature combination when it comes to sex appeal and her job saving the world is a perfect mix. (In other words, ) 3. I loved the character designs since before I watched the first episode.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 17, 2019 7:36 pm 1) Hard to decide, probably Asuka. 2)The plug suits in general are amazing designs (including the crazier Rebuild designs). It's hard to think of a character in particular though. 3)I instantly liked the designs. And they did attract my attention.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Feb 22, 2019 8:46 am 1) Rei, probably because my favorite character from Lego's Exo Force (whioch was half of my childhood and my gateway drug to mecha) took a lot of inspiration from her 2) I'd have to go with the same as kuribo here, the plug suits as a whole. Especially the scenes where they are pressure-fitted look just allaround awesome 3) The visual style of Eva clicked with me pretty much from the second I saw my first snippet of it (Unit 01 launch in a random YT video)

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Derek anthony » Tue Mar 26, 2019 11:48 am My favorite character designs is Shinji, also kaworu I also love the plug suit designs I also loved the designs before i seen the show

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Mar 27, 2019 4:04 pm 1. Ramiel 2. Ramiel 3. Yes, when I saw Ramiel.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Mar 27, 2019 4:35 pm Chuckman wrote: 1. Ramiel 2. Ramiel 3. Yes, when I saw Ramiel.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Mar 28, 2019 3:41 am Didn't even mention the Angel or Eva designs. They are amazing obviously. I remember the first time seeing Sachiel. That sense of mystery surrounding him. Oof, nostalgia (I was 15, and 14 when I first found out about the show).

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by ElvinHes » Mon Apr 08, 2019 6:30 am Gotta agree with Chuckman. Ramiel is pretty special and I just adore that character to bits ever since he started appearing. He just resonated with me.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Bhorium » Tue Apr 09, 2019 1:41 pm I'll have you know that Rami-chan is a girl.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Apr 09, 2019 7:25 pm Bhorium wrote: I'll have you know that Rami-chan is a girl.

[]: Re: Eva Character Designs             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 10, 2019 1:32 am Guy Nacks wrote: I’d have to disagree with a cis female label. That drill most certainly isn’t a strap-on.
